description: STUB — reserved for phase G4 (Role Permission Matrix editor). The final schema will hold a per-tenant 6×5 grid of (role × function) cells with constrained values (yes|no|read-only|operational|executive). See docs/g-phases/g4-permission-matrix.md for the design and the open questions that gate the final shape. This file exists ONLY to claim the schema code at the registration layer; do not seed data against it until the design lands.

STUB — reserved for phase G4 (introduced alongside the Role Permission Matrix editor, then reused by G5-G8). The final schema will record one row per save across all CRS.* configurator surfaces, with schemaCode + recordCode + before/after JSON + actor + timestamp. See docs/g-phases/g4-permission-matrix.md. This file exists ONLY to claim the schema code; do not seed data against it until the design lands.
